title: Columnea katzensteiniae

Columnea katzensteiniae is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant belongs to the genus Columnea, a group of flowering plants known for their vibrant flowers and adaptable nature. Columnea katzensteiniae is also known as the "Katzenstein's Columnea," a name that reflects its unique characteristics.
